applications.name: design-system plugin
applications.description: Plugin source for Accelerate Data's design system. Ships Claude and Codex manifests plus three installed skills under skills/: AD-owned brand application, upstream-derived component workflow, and upstream-derived screen composition. Lives inside the ad-design-system repo alongside source-only brand assets and upstream vendor snapshots at the parent level.

claude_manifest.description: Claude plugin manifest for this plugin.

codex_manifest.description: Codex plugin manifest for this plugin.

skills.description: Canonical skill directories. Each skill owns its SKILL.md and any supporting references or assets.

third_party_notices.description: Installed upstream attribution and MIT license notice for generated upstream-derived skills.

key_directories.skills/: All skill content owned by this plugin
key_directories.THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md: Installed upstream attribution and MIT license notice for generated upstream-derived skills
key_directories.../vendor/maxime-agent-skills/: Source-only raw upstream snapshot for generated component and design-screen skills; not included in plugin installs

skills.name: applying-design-system
skills.description: Accelerate Data visual brand guidance for vibeData UI. Use for brand-compliant premium surfaces across product, marketing, docs, demos, and internal tools.

skills.name: component
skills.description: Generated upstream-derived design-system component workflow from Maximepodgorski/agent-skills. See THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md for installed upstream attribution and MIT license notice.

skills.name: design-screen
skills.description: Generated upstream-derived screen composition workflow from Maximepodgorski/agent-skills. See THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md for installed upstream attribution and MIT license notice.

conventions.skill_location: All installed skills live under skills/<skill-name>/
conventions.supporting_material: References, assets, and agents stay inside the owning skill directory when needed
conventions.local_dev_symlinks: For direct local use, symlink skills/<skill-name> into ~/.claude/skills/<skill-name> and ~/.codex/skills/<skill-name>
conventions.cross_repo_dependencies: Do not add references that require files outside the plugin/ subtree. The parent repo's logo/ and brand book are not shipped with the plugin.
conventions.codex_repo_guidance: Codex uses AGENTS.md directly as the repo-local guidance surface; there is no separate Codex adapter file.

notes_for_agents.startup: Read this file before exploring the plugin. It is the primary startup context for structure, skill inventory, and conventions.
notes_for_agents.marketplace_model: This plugin is referenced from accelerate-data/plugin-marketplace via git-subdir with path 'plugin'. Only the plugin/ subtree is installed for users.
notes_for_agents.update_repo_map: Refresh this file whenever manifests, skill layout, or skill inventory changes.
notes_for_agents.generated_upstream_skills: skills/component/ and skills/design-screen/ are generated from ../vendor/maxime-agent-skills/ via ../scripts/sync_maxime_agent_skills.py. Change the adapter and rerun sync rather than hand-editing generated content.
notes_for_agents.ux_engineering_coverage: applying-design-system covers AD brand application; component covers component spec, docs, dev, review, accessibility, token usage, and audit; design-screen covers screen composition, responsive behavior, page states, and implementation handoff.
notes_for_agents.third_party_notices: Keep THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md installed with the plugin whenever upstream-derived skills are shipped.
